title: DialogOpenTerminalMethod
description: Contract for dialog.openTerminal. ELECTRON-HANDLED ONLY — opens Terminal at a folder on macOS. Never forwarded to the Go core.

path.description: Absolute path of the folder to open in Terminal

DialogOpenTerminalResponse.title: DialogOpenTerminalResponse
DialogOpenTerminalResponse.description: Result of dialog.openTerminal. Errors: unknown_error if Terminal cannot be launched.
